_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

_contextSnippet: the three combinations selected with Panobinostat neither reduced the tumor volume nor the final tumor weight in the sporadic PDOX model (MPNST-SP-01) after 25 days of treatment
details: Panobinostat combinations did not reduce tumor volume or weight after 25 days treatment
